title: /sethome and /home Commands
description: This mod adds 2 commands: /home, and /sethome. /sethome sets your home to your current coordinates. /home teleports you to those coordinates.
body: Never get lost again! Set a personal home with /sethome and return to it instantly using /home. Home locations are saved per-world and work across dimensions. Simple, lightweight, and survival-friendly.
